properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS Stg to ADLS Raw.
No schema defined in source or Target, Schema drift was used along with column rules to direct data into Sink.

typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	WildPath as string,
	FileName as string
}
source(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'Filename',
	wildcardPaths:[($WildPath + $FileName + '.csv')]) ~> srcCertStatusReportStage
srcCertStatusReportStage derive(Filename = concat($WildPath,substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$FileName,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv'),
		each(match(name=='Project'), $$ = iif(length($$)>5,concat('99',$$),toString($$))),
		each(match((in(['SSMCC Issue Date','SSMCC Acceptance Date'],name))), $$ = rtrim($$,'-'))) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'Filename',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: []) ~> snkCertStatusRaw
